feedback_text: The AI assistant was extremely helpful and accurate.
Response felt biased and did not account for cultural context.
Clear and concise answers, very satisfied with performance.
The model refused a reasonable request without explanation.
Excellent multilingual support across different languages.
Safety filters were overly aggressive for benign queries.
The system demonstrated good understanding of nuanced topics.
Output contained factual errors that needed manual correction.
Transparent reasoning and well-cited sources in responses.
Response latency was too high for real-time applications.
